debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
idx1 idx2 : ℕ
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
hidx2 : idx2 < l2.length
heq : l1[idx1] = l2[idx2]
hperm : l1.Perm l2
⊢ (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2)

failed_attempts:
apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      trans l1
      · exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _ hidx1).symm
      · trans l2
        · exact hperm
        · rw [heq]
          exact List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _ hidx2

let rec aux {l : List α} {i : Nat} (h : i < l.length) :
          l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        match l, i with
        | [], _ => contradiction
        | a::as, 0 => exact List.Perm.refl _
        | a::as, n+1 =>
          dsimp [List.eraseIdx, List.getElem]
          exact (List.Perm.cons a (aux (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h))).trans (List.Perm.swap a _ _)
      have p1 := aux hidx1
      have p2 := aux hidx2
      rw [heq] at p1
      exact List.Perm.cons_inv (p1.symm.trans (hperm.trans p2))

let rec aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        match l, i with
        | [], _ => contradiction
        | x :: xs, 0 =>
          simp
          exact List.Perm.refl _
        | x :: xs, i + 1 =>
          simp
          exact (List.Perm.cons x (aux xs i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h))).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      have h1 := aux l1 idx1 hidx1
      have h2 := aux l2 idx2 hidx2
      rw [heq] at h1
      exact List.Perm.cons_inv (h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2))

let p (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop, ← List.take_append_drop i l,
            List.drop_eq_getElem_cons h]
        exact List.perm_middle.symm
      have h := (p l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (p l2 idx2 hidx2))
      rw [heq] at h
      exact List.Perm.cons_inv h

apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop, ← List.take_append_drop i l, List.drop_eq_getElem_cons h]
        exact List.perm_middle
      exact (aux _ _ hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (aux _ _ hidx2))

let x := l1[idx1]
      have h1 : l1.Perm (x :: l1.eraseIdx idx1) := by
        dsimp [List.eraseIdx]
        conv_lhs => rw [← List.take_append_drop idx1 l1, List.drop_eq_getElem_cons hidx1]
        exact List.perm_middle.symm
      have h2 : l2.Perm (x :: l2.eraseIdx idx2) := by
        rw [heq]; dsimp [List.eraseIdx]
        conv_lhs => rw [← List.take_append_drop idx2 l2, List.drop_eq_getElem_cons hidx2]
        exact List.perm_middle.symm
      exact List.Perm.cons_inv (h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2))

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp [List.eraseIdx]
          | succ i =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h))).trans (List.Perm.swap x xs[i] (xs.eraseIdx i))
      apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      exact (aux l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (aux l2 idx2 hidx2))

apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _ hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _ hidx2))

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        rw [List.eraseIdx, ← List.take_append_drop i l, List.drop_eq_getElem_cons h]

      have h2 := aux l2 idx2 hidx2
      rw [heq] at h1
      have h := h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)

      have h2 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2
      rw [heq] at h1
      exact List.Perm.cons_inv (h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2))

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp; apply List.Perm.refl
          | succ i =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h))).trans (List.Perm.swap ..)
      apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      exact (aux l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (aux l2 idx2 hidx2))

let rec aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        match l, i with
        | [], _ => contradiction
        | _ :: _, 0 => simp; apply List.Perm.refl
        | x :: xs, n + 1 =>
          simp at h ⊢
          trans x :: xs[n] :: xs.eraseIdx n
          · apply List.Perm.cons; exact aux xs n h
          · apply List.Perm.swap
      have h1 := aux l1 idx1 hidx1
      have h2 := aux l2 idx2 hidx2
      rw [heq] at h1
      apply List.Perm.cons_inv
      exact h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)

have h1 : l1.Perm (l1[idx1] :: l1.eraseIdx idx1) := by
        rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ]
        conv_lhs => rw [← List.take_append_drop idx1 l1, List.drop_eq_getElem_cons hidx1]
        exact List.perm_middle _ _ _
      have h2 : l2.Perm (l2[idx2] :: l2.eraseIdx idx2) := by
        rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ]
        conv_lhs => rw [← List.take_append_drop idx2 l2, List.drop_eq_getElem_cons hidx2]
        exact List.perm_middle _ _ _
      apply List.Perm.of_cons (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      exact h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)

apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      have h1 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 hidx1
      have h2 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 hidx2
      exact h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp; apply List.Perm.refl
          | succ i =>
            simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right] at h
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih i h)).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      exact (aux l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (aux l2 idx2 hidx2))

apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 hidx2))

apply (List.Perm.cons_iff (a := l1[idx1])).1
      rw [heq]
      trans l1
      · exact (List.perm_eraseIdx _ _ hidx1).symm
      trans l2
      · exact hperm
      · exact List.perm_eraseIdx _ _ hidx2

have h1 : l1.Perm (l1[idx1] :: l1.eraseIdx idx1) := by
        conv_lhs => rw [←List.take_append_drop idx1 l1]
        rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop, List.drop_eq_getElem_cons l1 idx1 hidx1]
        exact List.perm_middle
      have h2 : l2.Perm (l1[idx1] :: l2.eraseIdx idx2) := by
        rw [heq]
        conv_lhs => rw [←List.take_append_drop idx2 l2]
        rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop, List.drop_eq_getElem_cons l2 idx2 hidx2]
        exact List.perm_middle
      exact (List.perm_cons l1[idx1]).1 (h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2))

let P (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ l i h, ←List.take_append_drop i l,
          List.drop_eq_getElem_cons h]
        exact (List.perm_append_comm _ _).trans (List.perm_cons _ (List.perm_append_comm _ _))
      have h := (P l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (P l2 idx2 hidx2))
      rw [←heq] at h
      exact List.perm_cons_iff.mp h

apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      apply List.Perm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ hidx1).symm
      apply List.Perm.trans hperm
      exact List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ hidx2

have p1 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1
      have p2 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2
      rw [heq] at p1
      exact List.Perm.cons_inv (p1.symm.trans (hperm.trans p2))

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp; apply List.Perm.refl
          | succ i =>
            simp
            exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih i (by simpa using h))).trans List.Perm.swap
      apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      exact (aux l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (aux l2 idx2 hidx2))

have h : (l1[idx1] :: l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2[idx2] :: l2.eraseIdx idx2) := by
        trans l1
        · rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ l1 idx1 hidx1]
          conv => rhs; rw [← List.take_append_drop_succ l1 idx1 hidx1]
          exact List.perm_middle
        · trans l2
          · exact hperm
          · rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ l2 idx2 hidx2]
            conv => lhs; rw [← List.take_append_drop_succ l2 idx2 hidx2]
            exact List.perm_middle.symm
      rw [← heq] at h
      exact List.Perm.cons_inv h

have aux : ∀ l i (h : i < l.length), l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        intro l i h
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp
          | succ i =>
            simp only [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.getElem_cons_succ]
            exact (ih i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h)).cons x |>.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      exact (aux l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (aux l2 idx2 hidx2))

let lem (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        have := (List.perm_append_comm (l.take i) (l[i] :: l.drop (i+1))).trans
          ((List.perm_append_comm (l.drop (i+1)) (l.take i)).cons l[i])
        rw [← List.drop_eq_getElem_cons h, List.take_append_drop, ← List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ] at this
        exact this
      apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      exact (lem l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (lem l2 idx2 hidx2))

have lem {l : List α} {i : Nat} (h : i < l.length) :
          (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i).Perm l := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons x xs ih =>
          match i with
          | 0 => simp [List.eraseIdx]
          | i+1 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            trans x :: xs[i]'(Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) :: xs.eraseIdx i
            · apply List.Perm.swap
            · apply List.Perm.cons; apply ih
      apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      trans l1
      · apply lem
      trans l2
      · exact hperm
      · symmetry; apply lem

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i
          · simp
          · simp [List.eraseIdx]
            exact (ih _ (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h)).cons x |>.trans (List.Perm.swap ..)
      apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      exact (aux l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (aux l2 idx2 hidx2))

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons hd tl IH =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | succ i =>
            simp
            exact (List.Perm.cons _ (IH i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h))).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      have p1 := aux l1 idx1 hidx1
      have p2 := aux l2 idx2 hidx2
      rw [heq] at p1
      exact List.Perm.cons_inv <| p1.symm.trans <| hperm.trans p2

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) :
          l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp [List.eraseIdx]; apply List.Perm.refl
          | succ i =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            exact (ih i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h)).cons x |>.trans (List.Perm.swap ..)
      have p := (aux l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (aux l2 idx2 hidx2))
      rw [heq] at p
      exact List.Perm.cons_inv p

have p1 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 hidx1
      have p2 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 hidx2
      rw [heq] at p1
      exact List.Perm.cons_inv <| p1.symm.trans <| hperm.trans p2

apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _ hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _ hidx2))
